package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerDataStructureChoiceMapStringBoolForMembership() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_data_structure_choice_map_string_bool_for_membership"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Data structure choice. Flag map[string]bool membership sets where map[string]struct{} avoids unnecessary value storage."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
